title: Free-Return Trajectory Simulator
data_source: Artemis II mission parameters (mass, delta-v, orbital elements)
builds_toward: Aerospace consulting, STEM education, mission planning tools
description: Simulate a free-return lunar trajectory using real Artemis II parameters. Vary TLI burn delta-v and observe how the trajectory changes — does it still come home? Plot Earth, Moon, and spacecraft positions. Compare your result to NASA's published trajectory.
